posts.text:
This was something to get excited about. Such a pleasure to be part of Marc’s roster —


Marc Adelman (@marcadelman)

A heartfelt thank you to these extraordinarily talented people for making the time to join us at the @HarvardIOP . I will always remember your kindness and generosity: You impact culture, policy, and our very politics—you shape our zeitgeist, make us think, make us feel, and—at your very best—make the world a more beautiful place to live. Kevin Allocca , @DanaBashCNN , @JamesBrow

Hi. I’d be happy to walk y’all through how to do this.


Brian Stelter (@brianstelter)

Make content for casual news consumers and those turned off by politics. As @cwarzel recently wrote, "people like to consume info when it's informally presented via parasocial relationships with influencers." Can news people make the "influencer" leap? theatlantic.com/technology/a…




— https://nitter.net/brianstelter/status/1857826951421186114#m

Elon, what do you want? We list some of the ways you could benefit from your influence with Trump. What are we missing? 

The News Not Noise Newsletter: Preparing for Trump 2.0, his picks, policies, and the Musk of it all. by @JessicaYellin open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

Feeling anxious or confused about Trump's sweeping victory? Wondering if all his voters support his most extreme policies?

We look at who broke for Trump and why. Plus bigots are acting emboldened and what women might hold back in the years ahead.

newsnotnoisejessicayellin.su…

The News Not Noise Election Night Cheat Sheet, 
What closes when, what we knew last time, who won last time, key counties and what's changed since then. 

Find it here:  @JessicaYellin open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

The News Not Noise Letter: Nauseously Optimistic. 

Emerging trends
Latest polls
Final ads
Big talkers
And the known unknowns 

In the latest newsletter:

open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

News Not Noise Letter: What I'm Watching with Days to Go:
Will young and senior women decide this election? Or will young men make history? RFK's getting WHAT? And don't mess with Liz Cheney. Campaign 2024 is coming to a close.

by @JessicaYellin open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

News Not Noise Letter: Who's Burning Ballots out West plus what the MSG rally says about Trump's closing strategy. Harris woos GOP women. The size of the Puerto Rican vote. And a new investigation at Diddy's jail..... all in the newsletter @JessicaYellin open.substack.com/pub/newsno…
News Not Noise Letter: Beyoncé vs Joe Rogan, by @JessicaYellin open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

The News Not Noise Letter: Grumpy Trump, by  VP Harris asks if Trump is fit to serve and did she "win" her throw down with Fox News? It's in the latest newsletter: 
 open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

Panda diplomacy is back. Plus: Militia fears hamper FEMA’s work, and Elon lands a booster. Plus reflections on building a haven from the noise.

In the News Not Noise Letter:
open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

In the latest News Not Noise Letter: Helene’s brutal aftermath (and how to help), plus an abortion ban reversal, Israel invades Lebanon, and 1 day till the VP debate. Hundreds Missing After Helene, by @JessicaYellin open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

Hurricane Helene breaks records. The world waits to learn the fate of Hezbollah's leader. Harris visits the border. And SNL turns 50. Plus some social posts to make you smile. It's all in the News Not Noise Letter. @JessicaYellin open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

There's more agreement among mothers than our politics suggests. Check out the polling that shows where super conservative and super liberal moms agree. Plus: Trump warns Catholics against voting for Democrats. It's in the latest News Not Noise Letter: newsnotnoisejessicayellin.su…

Pres Biden knows he’s being pushed out of the race. Some aides are pushing him to run out the clock. I explain how - also if Biden exits, can anyone other than VP Harris run? Is there time to make ballot deadlines? And how could Dems pick the nominee? 
open.substack.com/pub/newsno…

Joined the team at #WeCanDoHardThings to talk about the campaign, the shooting, and Democrats’ dilemma. @GlennonDoyle #amandadoyle + @AbbyWambach have such a thoughtful fresh take on the current reality. Whatever your view, it’s refreshing. Does this shift your perspective?


Glennon Doyle (@GlennonDoyle)

Join us today for a special episode drop - Is Biden In or Out? with @JessicaYellin - at apple.co/4flokaH or wherever you get your podcasts.





— https://nitter.net/GlennonDoyle/status/181362

Honored! 

Information not a panic attack!!


Suzy Kull (@suzykq5)

Turned it off long ago. My news source is @JessicaYellin News Not Noise



— https://nitter.net/suzykq5/status/1812898940209025214#m

. @axios is one of my most trusted news sources. This week @axios co founder @JimVandeHei is out with a cool new book - with hard earned wisdom on building a meaningful and successful career and life.

Congrats on  Just The Good Stuff Jim. Order here:

penguinrandomhouse.com/books…

Should iPhones and social media be banned for kids before high school? @JonHaidt says yes. 

instagram.com/reel/C48o0LZRO…

The murder of UnitedHealth Group CEO Brian Thompson invites a closer look at the health insurance industry - and the practice of denying claims to keep down costs.  What does industry practice teach us about privatizing services that meet basic human needs?   I get into that here.  Share your thoughts in comments.  #health #healthcare #insurance #government #care

Trump’s incoming “Border Czar” Tom Homan had a warning for any elected official – or seemingly any individual – who chooses to protect an undocumented person from ICE agents. He says American citizens will be arrested if they offer sanctuary or safety to those targeted, regardless of the individual’s history. While Homan says that they will prioritize arrests and detention of undocumented people who have a criminal record, he’s also made clear it’s not limited to those with criminal records. Thi

Former President @barackobama spit some @eminem lyrics at a Detroit rally  for Harris/Walz. He was introduced by the rapper who is famously a product of Detroit. Tiktok wont let menput captions on the video- they say its a copyright violation! 🤦‍♀️

Our favorite childless cat lady is using the return of The Eras Tour in the United States to get out the vote. As Taylor Swift begins the final leg of her record-breaking year with several shows in Miami this weekend, the Democratic National Committee is using the shows as a push to get out the vote Kamala Harris. There will be billboards outside the Hard Rock Stadium where Swift is performing encouraging people to vote and providing links to learn how and where to cast a ballot.  All weekend, S

Things we couldnt have imagined 4 years - or wven 3 minths - ago. At rhe @Texas Tribune festival Liz Cheney said her dad, Dick Cheney, will vote Harris/Walz. The Cheneys have been outspoken in sharing their view that Trump is a theat to democracy.

ONE ON ONE WITH FIRST GENTLEMAN DOUG EMHOFF We got a chance to speak with Second Gentleman  Doug Emhoff during the Democratic National Convention. After passing through multiple layers of heavy security in downtown Chicago, we were escorted to a hotel restaurant–turned–campaign war room. We spoke with Emhoff during a brief window between meetings with his team and convention events.  In the conversation I asked him about a range of topics, including what it would mean to be the first Jewish Amer

INFLUENCERS VS JOURNALISTS Today presidential nominee VP Kamala Harris and Gov Tim Walz sat for their first interview with traditional press since Biden dropped out. This interview came together after mounting pressure from traditional media, which claimed that the Harris/Walz campaign is granting reporters less access to the candidates than is standard for a major party nominee during an election year. Also today, the Harris/Walz campaign told the Washington Post that the creators who got crede

In Alabama, Democrat Marilyn Lands just won a special election for the state House by a whopping 25 points. She flipped a Republican seat by running a campaign focused on the recent Alabama Supreme Court ruling that threatened to end access to IVF and driving a message about reproductive rights.After her win she wrote on X, “Alabama women have spoken!”  Lands, who presented herself as a mom, a counselor and a Christian, talked about her own experience getting an abortion when a pregnancy was dee

RFK JR VP PICK: NICOLE SHANAHAN Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. announced his running mate in his independent bid for the presidency: Nicole Shanahan. She is an extremely wealthy environmental lawyer and entrepreneur and the ex-wife of Google cofounder Sergey Brin. In the announcement speech Kennedy introduced Shanahan as a "fellow lawyer, a brilliant scientist, technologist, a fierce warrior mom." Shanahan, 38, founded the Bia-Echo Foundation, a charitable organization she stood up to focus on "climate
